creator: pyunyh@gmail.com
text:
On Wed, Mar 16, 2011 at 03:40:13PM +0000, Zack Dannar wrote:

>  
>  John,
>  
>  I am unable to patch using your patchfile.  According to what I am seeing in
>  the diff, your pci.c file is very different than mine.  I am on 8.1.  I will
>  check to see if your patchfile fits 8.2.  If it does,  I will see about
>  upgrading to 8.2.
>  

I think the patch John sent would be cleanly applied to 8.2-RELEASE.
So it would be great if you can upgrade your box to 8.2-RELEASE to
try the patch.
